name: 100 MG Itraconazole Capsules
about: 100 MG Itraconazole Capsules are a type of general medicine that is commonly prescribed by doctors to treat various fungal infections. The dosage of these capsules is 100mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. Each box of these capsules contains 10 capsules. These capsules are manufactured in India and are of high quality. They come in the form of capsules that are easy to swallow. It is recommended to store these capsules in a cool and dry place to maintain their effectiveness.
